title: Microbiome Knowledge Graph Scoping Review: Data and Code
description: Complete dataset and source code for the scoping review 'Toward Semantic Knowledge Graph Infrastructure for Microbiome Intelligence: A PRISMA-ScR-Based Analysis and Framework'. Includes 769 literature records, screening decisions, classification data, and Python scripts for reproducible analysis.
notes: This dataset accompanies the scoping review published in Briefings in Bioinformatics. The repository contains: (1) Raw search results from PubMed, IEEE Xplore, and bioRxiv (769 records), (2) Screening decisions and exclusion criteria, (3) Classification data for 54 included studies, (4) Python scripts for deduplication, screening, and analysis, (5) SKGI (Semantic Knowledge Graph Infrastructure) reference implementation.
